Product renamed: BuildARPro.

tasks.title: Define agent team and task plan to complete BuildARPro
tasks.notes: 2026-04-30: Research done. CORRECTED PRODUCT VISION from Owner: NOT a generic AR DIY app. Core feature: (1) User takes a physical paper manual/instructions, (2) scans it with phone camera, (3) app performs OCR + 3D interpretation of the page content, (4) builds a 3D model on phone that is rotatable and matches what the manual depicts, (5) overlays step-by-step AR visual cues guiding the user through each build step. Target market: LOCAL (Israel) + PRIVATE/consumer market — NOT enterprise (too crowded). Stage: stealth, 0 users, Inon is sole creator. Product name confirmed: BuildARPro. Pitch deck + one-pager in progress.
